issues.message: Component exported from @gravity-ui/uikit (via components/mobile) but missing from data file entirely.
Hook exported from @gravity-ui/uikit (via components/mobile) but missing from data hooks array.
Hook exported from @gravity-ui/uikit (via components/mobile) but missing from data hooks array.
Hook exported from @gravity-ui/uikit (via components/layout/hooks) but missing from data hooks array.
Wrong import statement. Listed as 'import {ColorPicker} from @gravity-ui/uikit' but only available as unstable_ColorPicker from '@gravity-ui/uikit/unstable'.
Wrong import statement. Listed as 'import {FileDropZone} from @gravity-ui/uikit' but only available as unstable_FileDropZone from '@gravity-ui/uikit/unstable'.
Wrong import statement. Listed as 'import {ListItemView} from @gravity-ui/uikit' but only available as unstable_ListItemView from '@gravity-ui/uikit/unstable'.
Wrong import statement. Listed as 'import {TreeList} from @gravity-ui/uikit' but only available as unstable_TreeList from '@gravity-ui/uikit/unstable'.
Wrong import statement. Listed as 'import {TreeSelect} from @gravity-ui/uikit' but only available as unstable_TreeSelect from '@gravity-ui/uikit/unstable'.

Wrong import statement. Listed as 'import {Virtualizer} from @gravity-ui/uikit' but only available via '@gravity-ui/uikit/unstable'. Also has garbled props: renderRow, item, parentKey, renderChildren are listed as separate props but are parameters of the renderRow callback.
Component listed in data but NOT exported from @gravity-ui/uikit public API (not in components/index.ts or any re-export chain). It is an internal component only.

onClose prop type is listed as '() => void' but actual signature is '(event: MouseEvent | KeyboardEvent, reason: ModalCloseReason | closeButtonClick) => void'. Several props missing: onOpenChange, onEnterKeyDown, onEscapeKeyDown, onOutsideClick, container, initialFocus, returnFocus, modalClassName, disableHeightTransition, onTransitionIn/Out/InComplete/OutComplete.
Missing description field. While the component is technically exported, the 'Private' prefix suggests it is not intended for public use.
